repo-owned.description: Tracked skills under skills/ with validated frontmatter and package dry-run coverage.

official-vendor-external.description: External vendor-owned skills, such as Google, Microsoft, Supabase, or Cloudflare packs.

community-external.description: Community skills and awesome lists used as discovery input.

quarantine-external.description: External skills touching offensive security, credentials, proxies, or other high-risk behavior.
